notes: Case docketed 2019 but no decision opinion text found on candidate pages in GA 2019. This case is related to 2019-11, which is a follow-up case involving the same complainants (Dan and Angelia Crouse) and same presbytery (NW Georgia) but a different nomination review issue. The 2019-11 decision (GA 48, pp. 804-813) references 2019-03 as a prior case. Without the full opinion text for 2019-03 on the candidate pages, this case appears as mention_only or may have been consolidated with 2019-11.
